description: Early fusion ablation: concatenate 64-dim z-normalised financial feature vector with 768-dim L2-normalised FinBERT mean-pool embedding, then run cosine kNN with k=10 on the resulting 832-dim representation. Restricted to the 13,559-firm-year evaluation sample. MdAPE computed with the N9 evaluation function: ape = |actual - predicted| / |actual| on log-multiples.
notes: Reproduces the early-vs-late fusion ablation from N9 cells 19-20, which errored on sklearn import in the original run. Evaluation function matches N9 exactly so numbers are consistent with alpha_optimal.json and the rest of the thesis. Replaces any earlier ad-hoc figure (e.g. 43.03%).
